task_completion.description: Verify that the correct patient, Ruben Bayer (DOB: 1955-08-22), has been selected or identified in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the patient's name 'Ruben Bayer' and DOB '1955-08-22' active in the patient header, chart, or selection screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the procedure 'Chest X-Ray (PA and Lateral views)' is selected for ordering.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Chest X-Ray', 'PA and Lateral', or equivalent procedure text selected in the radiology order entry form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the clinical indication regarding pneumonia evaluation is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Evaluate for pneumonia - patient with 5-day history of productive cough, fever 101.2F, and dyspnea' in the clinical indication, reason for exam, or notes field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the order priority is set to 'Normal'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a priority dropdown, radio button, or label indicating 'Normal' (or 'Routine') is selected for the order.

task_completion.description: Verify that the radiology procedure order has been created or submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a confirmation message, a 'Submit', 'Sign', or 'Save' button being clicked, or the order appearing in a list of newly created orders.

task_completion.description: Verify that the submitted order is active and has a valid timestamp.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the order in an 'Active', 'Pending', or 'Ordered' state in the patient's chart or order history, accompanied by a recent date/time.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface of the medical software rather than terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual medical software interface being navigated, not a terminal window, console, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for text typed into the application's input fields, rather than just a text editor or notepad displaying the required information.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from genuine software interaction and not HTML manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to fake the order confirmation or patient details.
